MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-22-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 13, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 22, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHES THAT DEFENDANT OWES $3,546.24 ON THE ACCOUNT. THE DECLARATION OF BARBARA HORAN IS ADMISSIBLE. SEE EVID. 1271. IN OPPOSITION, DEFENDANT FAILS TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT PROVIDE A DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION. DEFENDANT CANNOT RELY ON HER UNVERIFIED INTERROGATORY ANSWERS TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. SEE CCP 2030.410 [USE OF INTERROGATORIES]. THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. DEFENDANT DID NOT ACT DILIGENTLY AND SHOULD HAVE SOUGHT TO RESOLVE THE ISSUE REGARDING MS. HORAN'S DEPOSITION MONTHS AGO. CCP 437C(E) PROVIDES THAT SUMMARY JUDGMENT SHOULD NOT BE DENIED FOR WANT OF CROSS-EXAMINATION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Apr-08-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Plaintiff establishes that defendant owes $3,546.24 on the account. The declaration of Barbara Horan is admissible. See Evid. 1271. In opposition, defendant fails to create a triable issue of material fact. Defendant does not provide a declaration in opposition. Defendant cannot rely on her unverified interrogatory answers to create a triable issue of material fact. See CCP 2030.410 [use of interrogatories]. The court denies defendant's request for a continuance. Defendant did not act diligently and should have sought to resolve the issue regarding Ms. Horan's deposition months ago. CCP 437c(e) provides that summary judgment should not be denied for want of cross-examination. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2014 Continued To Nov-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to November 13, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 22, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
